scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key bases (ubuntu@22.04, 24.04, 24.10, 25.04, almalinux@9), architectures (amd64, arm64, armhf, ppc64el, s390x), multi-base builds, cross-compilation, and architecture-independent charms. Accurately explains that top-level base is not used in multi-base builds. Adds useful context about interim bases requiring build-base.
